tracks.rawText: 3:27****v5Modern trap production featuring a dark, atmospheric minor-key piano loop as the primary melodic foundation, The beat is driven by a heavy, distorted 808 bassline that follows the root notes of the progression, paired with crisp, high-frequency hi-hat rolls and a sharp, centered snare, The tempo is approximately 140 BPM with a half-time feel, The vocal performance is a rhythmic, aggressive rap delivery with a gritty, confident tone, utilizing heavy compression and subtle pitch correction, The mix is bass-heavy with a wide stereo image for the atmospheric synth pads in the background, while the vocals and percussion remain tightly focused in the centerPublishRemix
